text: Buhar tahrikli iki tekerlekli bir araç motosiklet olarak kabul edilirse, ilk motosikletler, patent başvurusu Aralık 1868'de yapılan Fransız Michaux-Perreaux buharlı velosipeti ve 1867'den beri doğu ABD'deki fuarlarda ve sirklerde makinesini sergileyen Sylvester H. Roper of Roxbury, Massachusetts, who had been demonstrating his machine at fairs and circuses in the eastern U.S. since 1867.'
storage_reason: This nugget provides historical context about early steam-powered two-wheeled vehicles that could be considered early motorcycles, offering a different perspective on their origins.
